span.p:
Compass timeline rows
event kind, touched scopes, fanout

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Local changes
path class, generated vs source, governance-only

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Radar and plan truth
status, execution tasks, verified completion

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Proof State
warning posture, blocker frontier, unsafe closeout

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Delivery and operator readouts
stale authority, conflict, claim guard

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Deterministic feature vectors
fanout, generated-only, governance-only,
verified local, active execution, warning, blocker

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Shared rung rules
R0 suppressed_noise
R1 background_trace
R2 verified_local
R3 active_scope
R4 actionable_priority
R5 blocking_frontier

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Caps and rollups
governance-only <= R1
broad fanout <= R1
generated-only -> R0
child R5 dominates parent

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
scope_signal payload
rung, token, reasons, caps,
promoted_default, budget_class

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
none
no fresh expensive work

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
cache_only
reuse and deterministic only

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
fast_simple
cheap local/simple reasoning only

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
escalated_reasoning
fresh provider or heavier reasoning allowed

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Compass
scope dropdowns, scoped timelines,
promoted workstreams, narration budgets

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Radar
default operational ordering and focus chips

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Registry
component ordering and operator readout priority

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Atlas
active-workstream pills and default promotion

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Dashboard / shell / chatter
compute budget gating and escalation order

div.style: color: rgb(31, 53, 95) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
One additive contract decides visibility, promotion, and budget.
Raw source truth stays exhaustive; default operator focus becomes selective.
